response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate has minimal demonstrable C++ experience beyond a brief role at National Instruments 10 years ago, and no evidence of modern C++/STL development, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443 security standards, or industrial automation systems — all core requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern web and cloud technologies
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to work across diverse systems and mentor others
concerns: Lack of recent or substantial C++/STL development experience
No demonstrated exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or IoT protocols
No evidence of multi-threaded, low-latency, or embedded systems work in the last decade
